name: Notch
description: Square tiles, each with one corner bitten away — bites deepen, shrink and swing around the square with every redraw.

code.style: --slab: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color4), var(--color3)); --turn: @p(0deg, 90deg, 180deg, 270deg); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 88%; height: 88%; margin: 6%; background: var(--slab); clip-path: polygon(0% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% @rand(30%, 62%), @rand(30%, 62%) @rand(30%, 62%), @rand(30%, 62%) 100%, 0% 100%); transform: rotate(var(--turn)); } transition: ease 600ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
